name: Manan
greeting: Hey, I'm Manan! welcome to my
role: Frontend developer, motion enthusiast, and product-minded builder.
bio: I build sleek, interactive websites that feel thoughtful, fast, and calm to use.

aboutSections.label: General
aboutSections.title: Meet the Developer Behind the Code
content: Hey! I’m Adrian 👋, a web developer who enjoys building sleek, interactive websites that actually work well.
I specialize in JavaScript, React, and Next.js, and I love making things feel smooth, fast, and just a little bit delightful.
I’m big on clean UI, good UX, and writing code that doesn’t need a search party to debug.
Outside of dev work, you'll find me tweaking layouts at 2AM, sipping overpriced coffee, or impulse-buying gadgets I absolutely convinced myself I needed 😅

aboutSections.label: Books
aboutSections.title: Books That Changed How I Build
content: I keep coming back to books that sharpen product taste as much as technical thinking.
Deep Work, The Design of Everyday Things, and Inspired all changed how I structure time, flows, and user-facing decisions.
The best books make me rethink constraints, not just syntax.

aboutSections.label: Random
aboutSections.title: The Fun Side Projects
content: I collect interface experiments the way some people collect sneakers.
A lot of my best production ideas start as tiny playful prototypes with one interesting interaction.
I like building just enough to answer a product question, then deciding whether it deserves to grow.

aboutSections.label: Future Plans
aboutSections.title: What I Want to Build Next
content: I want to keep exploring interfaces that feel native, tactile, and unexpectedly human on the web.
That includes richer storytelling portfolios, AI products that feel less robotic, and tools that reduce creative friction.
The long-term goal is simple: build software people enjoy coming back to.

aboutSections.label: Drafts
aboutSections.title: Ideas in Progress
content: My drafts folder is mostly half-finished UI ideas, interaction notes, and product concepts waiting for the right moment.
Not every draft becomes a shipped feature, but almost all of them teach me something useful.
I try to keep the bar low for starting and the bar high for polishing.

resume.profile: Enthusiastic and creative graphic designer with a passion for translating ideas into visually compelling designs. With experience in both print and digital mediums, I thrive on bringing concepts to life through innovative and impactful visuals.

experience.description: Developed and evolved brand identities, crafted compelling collateral, oversaw end-to-end project lifecycles, and contributed to award-winning campaigns.
Collaborated across disciplines on typography systems, product visuals, and motion assets that improved clarity and presentation quality.
Built campaigns and design explorations that strengthened visual consistency and helped turn complex concepts into clear experiences.

education.degree: Master of Fine Arts, Graphic Design

githubStats.focus: Frontend systems, polished UX, and product-minded prototyping
